articles.title: Czech Republic: Fiscal stance stays only slightly looser – ING
articles.snippet: ING analysts Frantisek Taborsky and David Havrlant say Czech fiscal policy has loosened only marginally after the election, with the public finance deficit seen at 2.2% of GDP in 2026 and risks tilted higher.

combined_text:
[0.33] Czech Republic: Fiscal stance stays only slightly looser – ING
ING analysts Frantisek Taborsky and David Havrlant say Czech fiscal policy has loosened only marginally after the election, with the public finance deficit seen at 2.2% of GDP in 2026 and risks tilted higher.
